description: Bar chart on a light textured white background. At the top center is the circular U.S. Department of Labor seal ('DEPARTMENT OF LABOR · UNITED STATES OF AMERICA'). Below it a bold black serif headline reads 'Private Sector Job Creation in January Blew Past Expectations'. The chart shows four vertical bars on a y-axis scaled 0 to 200: 'Private Sector Jobs' = 172 (tall blue bar), 'Bloomberg Expectations' = 70 (gray bar), 'CNBC' = 0, and 'Moody's' = 0. A footnote reads 'Source: Bureau of Labor Statistics, Bloomberg, CEA Calculations'.
notable_text: Private Sector Job Creation in January Blew Past Expectations; Private Sector Jobs 172; Bloomberg Expectations 70; Source: Bureau of Labor Statistics, Bloomberg, CEA Calculations
